meaning: adj.有花边的,绑带子的,加酒的
examples: They sat with their fingers laced.
He sat on the steps, and laced up his boots.
Her conversation was laced with witty asides.
Police in riot gear responded with "blast ball" grenades that release smoke laced with pepper spray.
Maybe not, tech-laced Austin, for example, finished dead last on this list of stressful places.
